title: Athyriopsis conilii
taxonomy: Athyriopsis conilii belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is a member of the genus Athyriopsis. It is a type of fern, specifically a vascular plant that reproduces via spores. This plant is native to certain regions of the world, including the tropical and subtropical zones. The classification of Athyriopsis conilii is further categorized under the division Pteridophyta. Athyriopsis conilii is also known to be an epiphytic plant, growing on other plants for support.
